use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF THE CARDIOMYOPATHY OF WILD TYPE OR HEREDITARY TRANSTHYRETIN-MEDIATED AMYLOIDOSIS (ATTR-CM)

indications.text:
VYNDAQEL and VYNDAMAX are indicated for the treatment of the cardiomyopathy of wild-type or
hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis (ATTR-CM) in adults to reduce cardiovascular mortality and
cardiovascular-related hospitalization.

cardiovascular-related hospitalization.
